mapper.select: SELECT V.MGR_COMP_NM as deptNm, C.CODE_TEXT as codeText, M.COMP_CD as compCd, M.MAIL_TYPE_CD as mailTypeCd, M.MAIL_TITLE as mailTitle, M.MAIL_CONT as mailCont, M.MAIL_DESC as mailDesc FROM TC_MAIL_FORM M LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE V ON M.COMP_CD = V.MGR_COMP_CD LEFT JOIN TC_CODE C ON M.MAIL_TYPE_CD = C.CODE_CD AND C.GROUP_CD = 'MAIL_TYPE' WHERE M.COMP_CD = #{compCd}
